suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Relax the mandatory red-first wording to allow tightly coupled lexer/parser-style fixes where a regression test and implementation are added together before the first validator run, while still requiring the final handoff to explain why a separate failing-test step was impractical.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The re-review for phase-1-fix-malformed-prefixed-integers references worker session 97e3be31-41e7-4523-99fb-644df759d54f, where the lexer rule and regression cases were applied together before the first `nix develop -c dune runtest`. The fix still produced the required regression coverage and passed all validators, but current compiler-worker step 3 labels this practical workflow as a deviation.
